data.name: Papasha

weaponImprint.name: Svarog
weaponImprint.trait: When dealing damage, for each debuff on the target, ignore 5% of its defense, up to 20%.
weaponImprint.effect: Targeted damage dealt by the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is increased by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. After the unit or an allied unit launches a Support Attack, the critical rate of its next active attack is increased by 10%, up to a maximum of 30%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Large Targets is increased by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A warm-hearted Doll who doesn't know how to say "no", she has become a versatile helper through self-study in order to better handle any request. She is willing to give everything to protect everyone. When you encounter difficulties, feel free to rely on her-no mater what it is, Papasha will make it happen!

skills.name: Warning Shot
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 60% of attack to them.

skills.name: Counter Terrorism Support
skills.description: After Papasha attacks an enemy target, the City Warden will follow up with a Support Attack on the same target, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

summon.name: City Warden
summon.unitInfo: A warden of the City. Protector of all that is good and fair in this world. If you need an unflinching soldier in the war against evil, this robot is for you.

skills.name: Explosion Prevention Measures
skills.description:
At the end of the turn, the City Warden will move independently to seek cover.

The City Warden's healing received is reduced by 100% and it cannot receive shields. When Papasha is healed, the City Warden restores 10% of its max HP. When the City Warden takes fatal damage, it enters [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] state for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of the turn, the City Warden will move independently to seek cover.

The City Warden's healing received is reduced by 100% and it cannot receive shields. When Papasha is healed, the City Warden restores 20% of its max HP. When the City Warden takes fatal damage, it enters [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] state for 1 turn.

summon.name: City Warden
summon.unitInfo: A warden of the City. Protector of all that is good and fair in this world. If you need an unflinching soldier in the war against evil, this robot is for you.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The duration of the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] is reduced by 1 turn. After the user is healed, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] restores HP equal to 20% of its max HP.

The stability requirement for the target has been removed.

The effects of [effect:5aa28bfd-5b57-4578-b1ff-015088da504f] is enhanced: ignores 30% of defense when attacking Large Targets.

skills.name: Security Monitoring
skills.description:
At the end of the action, attacks the enemy target within the map that has used a basic attack or an active skill, dealing Physical damage equal to 40% of attack to them. This effect can activate up to 1 time per turn.

Note: This skill is inactive until V5.
skills.descriptionLevel2: At the end of the action, attacks the enemy target within the map that has used a basic attack or an active skill, dealing Physical damage equal to 40% of attack to them. This effect can activate up to 1 time per turn.

summon.name: City Warden
summon.unitInfo: A warden of the City. Protector of all that is good and fair in this world. If you need an unflinching soldier in the war against evil, this robot is for you.

skills.name: United Guards
skills.description:
At the start of the battle, summons a [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] near the user.

After either the user or the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] attacks, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

When the user lands a critical hit, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s next attack receives a 20% critical rate boost. Similarly when the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] lands a critical hit, the user's next attack gains a 20% critical rate boost.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, summons a [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] on an adjacent tile near the user, increasing its critical rate by 30% and Critical damage by 20%.

At the start of the battle, the user gains 3 stacks of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

At the end of the action, the user gains 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

After either the user or the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] attacks, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

When the user lands a critical hit, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s next attack receives a 20% critical rate boost. Similarly when the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] lands a critical hit, the user's next attack gains a 20% critical rate boost.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, summons a [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] near the user, increasing its critical rate by 30%, critical damage by 20%, and gains [effect:908ec419-871d-4297-bbb8-e12e4b46d7f9].

At the start of the battle, the user gains 3 stacks of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

At the end of the action, the user gains 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36] .

After either the user or the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] attacks, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

When the user lands a critical hit, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s next attack receives a 20% critical rate boost. Similarly when the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] lands a critical hit, the user's next attack gains a 20% critical rate boost.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
When the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is summoned, its critical rate is increased by 30%, and critical damage by 20%.

At the start of the battle, the user gains 3 stacks of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36]. At the end of the action, the user gains 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

skills.name: Honor Guard
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 1 tile. If the selected target's stability index remains greater than 0 after the attack, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:5aa28bfd-5b57-4578-b1ff-015088da504f] for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to the target and all enemy targets within 1 tile. The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:5aa28bfd-5b57-4578-b1ff-015088da504f] for 3 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The duration of the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] is reduced by 1 turn. After the user is healed, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] restores HP equal to 20% of its max HP.

The stability requirement for the target has been removed.

The effects of [effect:5aa28bfd-5b57-4578-b1ff-015088da504f] is enhanced: ignores 30% of defense when attacking Large Targets.

skills.name: Joint Breakthrough
skills.description:
Selects 1 tile within 6 tiles, cleansing 2 debuffs from the user, as well as all control, Command Prohibition effects, and the Frigid effect from the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]. The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] moves to the selected tile and attacks the closest enemy to Papasha, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. This attack has an additional 50% damage boost against Large targets.

After using this skill, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] will not move independently for the remainder of the turn.

This skill cannot be used if the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is undergoing [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects any empty tile on the battlefield, cleanses 2 debuffs from self, and any Control, Command Prohibition, or Frigid effects from the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]. The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] moves to the selected tile and attacks the closest enemy to Papasha, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. This attack is guaranteed to crit, and has an additional 50% damage boost against large targets.

After using this skill, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] will not move independently and will target the nearest enemy unit with Counter Terrorism Support once at the end of the turn.

This skill cannot be used if the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is undergoing [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The casting range is expanded to the entire battlefield, and this attack is guaranteed to deal a critical hit. At the end of the turn, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] launches 1 more instance of Counter Terrorism Support on the nearest enemy target.

skills.name: Heart of Protection
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] for 2 turns.

Before the attack, for each buff the user has, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 1 random attack buff, up to a maximum of 2 buffs, lasting for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. The[summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] for 2 turns.

Before the attack, for each buff the user has, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 1 random attack buff. For every more than 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36], it counts as 1 independent buff, up to a maximum of 3 buffs, lasting for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack.

The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:a28e7dac-cdbd-4b37-960a-a32e21096a09] for 2 turns. At the start of the battle, gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] permanently.

Before the attack, each buff the user has, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 1 random attack buff. For every more than 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36], it counts as 1 independent buff, up to a maximum of 3 buffs, lasting for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The effects of [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] are enhanced: Increases the damage taken by the target up to 80%. The potency of random attack buffs is amplified, and the maximum number of attack buffs is increased to 3 buffs. For every more than 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36], it counts as 1 independent buff.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] permanently at the start of battle. Heart of Protection now applies [effect:a28e7dac-cdbd-4b37-960a-a32e21096a09] for 2 turns.

keys.effect: Increases damage dealt by allied units' support skills (excluding self) by 10%. Can trigger at most once per turn.

Damage dealt by [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is increased by 50%. While [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is present on the field, damage dealt by all ally [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] is increased by 30% and gain [effect:2a885794-26bf-4b04-8908-e5b4d3645575] at the end of their action, lasting for 1 turn.

The Confectance Index cost of the active skill [dollSkill:80684d20-d47d-43ab-ae47-3b14c8c693d4] is reduced by 3 points and when casted, [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 2 stacks of [effect:8a2f2d51-5a66-4101-b628-ef10d7ba2a1d].

When using the active skill Honor Guard to attack a Large Target, increases damage dealt by 20%. The stability damage of the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s active skill Counter Terrorism Support is increased by 2 points.
When the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is undergoing [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202], Papasha's damage deal is increased by 20%.
The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] is unable to move independently, but its attack is increased by 10%.
When the active skill Joint Breakthrough deals damage, if there are no enemy units within 3 tiles around the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc], damage deal is increased by 10%.
At the start of the turn, if Papasha has less than or equal to 1 buff that can be cleansed, she gains 1 random buff that can be cleansed for 1 turn.
At the start of the turn, the unit with the lower attack between the use and the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:7edd4ba7-819f-409c-b20f-9715d02075f5] for 1 turn.

vertebrae.effect:
The duration of the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] is reduced by 1 turn. After the user is healed, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] restores HP equal to 20% of its max HP.

The stability requirement for the target has been removed.

The effects of [effect:5aa28bfd-5b57-4578-b1ff-015088da504f] is enhanced: ignores 30% of defense when attacking Large Targets.

doll.name: Papasha
doll.effects: A warm-hearted Doll who doesn't know how to say "no", she has become a versatile helper through self-study in order to better handle any request. She is willing to give everything to protect everyone. When you encounter difficulties, feel free to rely on her-no mater what it is, Papasha will make it happen!

doll.name: Papasha
doll.effects: A warm-hearted Doll who doesn't know how to say "no", she has become a versatile helper through self-study in order to better handle any request. She is willing to give everything to protect everyone. When you encounter difficulties, feel free to rely on her-no mater what it is, Papasha will make it happen!

skillsLevel2.name: Security Monitoring
skillsLevel2.description:
At the end of the action, attacks the enemy target within the map that has used a basic attack or an active skill, dealing Physical damage equal to 40% of attack to them. This effect can activate up to 1 time per turn.

Note: This skill is inactive until V5.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2: At the end of the action, attacks the enemy target within the map that has used a basic attack or an active skill, dealing Physical damage equal to 40% of attack to them. This effect can activate up to 1 time per turn.

skillsLevel3.name: United Guards
skillsLevel3.description:
At the start of the battle, summons a [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] near the user.

After either the user or the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] attacks, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

When the user lands a critical hit, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s next attack receives a 20% critical rate boost. Similarly when the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] lands a critical hit, the user's next attack gains a 20% critical rate boost.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, summons a [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] on an adjacent tile near the user, increasing its critical rate by 30% and Critical damage by 20%.

At the start of the battle, the user gains 3 stacks of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

At the end of the action, the user gains 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

After either the user or the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] attacks, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

When the user lands a critical hit, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s next attack receives a 20% critical rate boost. Similarly when the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] lands a critical hit, the user's next attack gains a 20% critical rate boost.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, summons a [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] near the user, increasing its critical rate by 30%, critical damage by 20%, and gains [effect:908ec419-871d-4297-bbb8-e12e4b46d7f9].

At the start of the battle, the user gains 3 stacks of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36].

At the end of the action, the user gains 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36] .

After either the user or the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] attacks, the user gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

When the user lands a critical hit, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s next attack receives a 20% critical rate boost. Similarly when the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] lands a critical hit, the user's next attack gains a 20% critical rate boost.

summonsLevel2.name: City Warden
summonsLevel2.unitInfo: A warden of the City. Protector of all that is good and fair in this world. If you need an unflinching soldier in the war against evil, this robot is for you.

vertebrae.effect: The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] permanently at the start of battle. Heart of Protection now applies [effect:a28e7dac-cdbd-4b37-960a-a32e21096a09] for 2 turns.

doll.name: Papasha
doll.effects: A warm-hearted Doll who doesn't know how to say "no", she has become a versatile helper through self-study in order to better handle any request. She is willing to give everything to protect everyone. When you encounter difficulties, feel free to rely on her-no mater what it is, Papasha will make it happen!

skillsLevel3.name: Heart of Protection
skillsLevel3.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] for 2 turns.

Before the attack, for each buff the user has, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 1 random attack buff, up to a maximum of 2 buffs, lasting for 2 turns.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack. The[summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] for 2 turns.

Before the attack, for each buff the user has, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 1 random attack buff. For every more than 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36], it counts as 1 independent buff, up to a maximum of 3 buffs, lasting for 2 turns.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 150% of attack.

The [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains [effect:a28e7dac-cdbd-4b37-960a-a32e21096a09] for 2 turns. At the start of the battle, gains [effect:e814390a-f8b2-4fde-b549-c99fde7660f8] permanently.

Before the attack, each buff the user has, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] gains 1 random attack buff. For every more than 1 stack of [effect:d011f494-6976-4868-9810-b4ce99f1ef36], it counts as 1 independent buff, up to a maximum of 3 buffs, lasting for 2 turns.

summons.name: City Warden
summons.unitInfo: A warden of the City. Protector of all that is good and fair in this world. If you need an unflinching soldier in the war against evil, this robot is for you.

skills.name: Counter Terrorism Support
skills.description: After Papasha attacks an enemy target, the City Warden will follow up with a Support Attack on the same target, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Explosion Prevention Measures
skills.description:
At the end of the turn, the City Warden will move independently to seek cover.

The City Warden's healing received is reduced by 100% and it cannot receive shields. When Papasha is healed, the City Warden restores 10% of its max HP. When the City Warden takes fatal damage, it enters [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] state for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of the turn, the City Warden will move independently to seek cover.

The City Warden's healing received is reduced by 100% and it cannot receive shields. When Papasha is healed, the City Warden restores 20% of its max HP. When the City Warden takes fatal damage, it enters [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] state for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The duration of the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc]'s [effect:58b037ca-2154-420f-9920-f3716e8f0202] is reduced by 1 turn. After the user is healed, the [summon:6a80e3ff-1f7c-481d-8976-ed6c8ecd73dc] restores HP equal to 20% of its max HP.

The stability requirement for the target has been removed.

The effects of [effect:5aa28bfd-5b57-4578-b1ff-015088da504f] is enhanced: ignores 30% of defense when attacking Large Targets.

skills.name: Security Monitoring
skills.description:
At the end of the action, attacks the enemy target within the map that has used a basic attack or an active skill, dealing Physical damage equal to 40% of attack to them. This effect can activate up to 1 time per turn.

Note: This skill is inactive until V5.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by this unit's Physical Summons is increased by 8%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Increases attack by 10%. This buff cannot be cleansed.

Each stack gained increases self and City Warden's targeted damage by 10%. All stacks are removed before a new attack a new attack target is selected. Maximum of 3 stacks. This buff cannot be cleansed.
Attacks 1 more time with Surveillance. For each time the enemy target is attacked, increase damage dealt to that target by 5%. This buff cannot be cleansed.

At the end of this unit's action, perform Suveillance on the entire map. When an enemy unit uses a basic attack or an active attack, damage them for 40% of own attack. This effect can trigger 1 time per turn.

When the City Warden takes lethal damage, it gains this effect. Becomes immune to all damage and fixed damage, and cannot act or be attacked. When the effect duration ends, remove all debuffs and restores all of its HP and stability index.
Damage taken is reduced by 50%. When damage is taken, 1 stack of this buff is removed. Stacks up to 2 times. This is considered a defense buff.
